steps.title: Find the time anchor
steps.content: “On August 15, 2013” is a specific past date. The verb in the blank must match that completed-past time frame. Rule: verb tense must agree with the time anchor in the sentence.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• "will publish": Future tense implies the publication has not yet occurred — but 2013 is already in the past. Violates tense-agreement rule. ✗
  • "published": Simple past matches the 2013 date, describing a completed action. ✓
  • "publishes": Simple present treats the 2013 event as habitual or ongoing now. Violates tense-agreement rule. ✗
  • "is publishing": Present progressive implies the Navajo Times is publishing the profile at this moment, not in 2013. Violates tense-agreement rule. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
